heading: Authority to provide assistance
label: 3902 Authority to provide assistance

Rulemaking Process, , , provided in part:Pub. L. 119–74, div. B, title I140 Stat. 66Jan. 23, 2026“That not later than 60 days after the date of enactment of this Act [], the Secretary [of the Army] shall begin a rulemaking process to establish the process to provide financial assistance for projects to construct, maintain, upgrade, and repair levees and ancillary features with a primary owner type of State, municipal, county, private, or other non-Federal entity”.Jan. 23, 2026

B, title I140 Stat. 66Jan. 23, 2026“That not later than 60 days after the date of enactment of this Act [], the Secretary [of the Army] shall begin a rulemaking process to establish the process to provide financial assistance for projects to construct, maintain, upgrade, and repair levees and ancillary features with a primary owner type of State, municipal, county, private, or other non-Federal entity”.Jan. 23, 2026

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary and the Administrator may provide financial assistance under this chapter to carry out projects, which shall be selected to ensure a diversity of project types and geographical locations.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 1 Secretary
children.text: The Secretary shall provide financial assistance to carry out all projects under this chapter that are eligible projects under .section 3905(1) of this title

children.heading: Administrator
children.label: 2 Administrator
children.text: The Administrator shall provide financial assistance to carry out all projects under this chapter that are eligible projects under paragraphs (2), (3), (4), (5), (6), (7), and (9) of .section 3905 of this title

children.heading: Other projects
children.label: 3 Other projects
children.text: The Secretary or the Administrator, as applicable, may carry out eligible projects under paragraph (8) or (10) of .section 3905 of this title
